% check a.php
a.php:12:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:12:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:6:1: $bar is of type: Path\To\Module\Bar (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:9:10: class Path\To\Grouped\BBB\Foo not found
d.php:10:10: class Path\To\Grouped\CCC\Foo not found

-- a.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To;

class View
{
	public function getInstance(): Module\Bar;
}

$v = new View;
$bar = $v->getInstance();
#debugType $bar
-- b.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module\Bar;

class View
{
	public function getInstance(): Bar;
}

$v = new View;
$bar = $v->getInstance();
#debugType $bar
-- c.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Module as Other;

$bar = new Other\Bar;
#debugType $bar
-- util.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To\Module;

use const FOO_BAR;
use function is_array;

class Bar
{
}
-- d.php --
<?php

use Path\To\Grouped\{
	AAA,
	BBB,
	CCC as DDD
};

$x = new BBB\Foo;
$x = new DDD\Foo;
